description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench and table set, featuring a combination of wood and metal materials. The bench consists of two long wooden seating surfaces, each supported by sturdy, curved metal legs with a distinctive oval cutout design. The central table has a matching wooden frame with a metal lattice top, providing both durability and a contemporary aesthetic. The wood slats are evenly spaced, giving the set a clean, linear appearance, while the metal elements are finished in a matte gray. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for public parks, plazas, or urban gathering spaces.
description: A modern wood-and-metal bench and table set with curved metal legs and a slatted design, ideal for outdoor urban spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side profile of the bench and table, showing the curved metal legs and the slatted wood surfaces.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the length of the bench and table, with a clear view of the metal lattice tabletop and the wooden seating.
description_view_2: This view provides a similar perspective to view 0 but from the opposite side, again showcasing the curved metal supports and slatted wood.
description_view_3: This angle offers a direct look at the bench and table from the end, highlighting the symmetry and the open space beneath the table.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports with oval cutouts
